note: #2366 is fixed (this PR). The fixture below no longer carries a currentBuggyOutput — per the tripwire contract in representative-corpus.test.cjs, the fixer flips the assertion to the expected* fields once the bug is gone. parseCoverageMatrix now scopes to the canonical Coverage table schema, so the decoy summary table is ignored and the bolded / section-split rows parse correctly.

fixtures.pairedPlan: Integrate the Stripe API for payment processing.
fixtures.note: Self-contained 15-line COVERAGE.md from #2366's own reproduction: one canonical matrix (search/skip), a second section-split canonical table (widget) for a transferred capability, and a decoy 3-column summary table whose 2nd cell reads 'INTEGRATE'. Fixed: rows are read only from a table whose header matches the canonical Coverage schema, so the decoy summary table no longer invents a 'tier' capability, the bolded 'skip' OPT-OUT parses, and the section-split 'widget' row is carried — exactly 3 rows (search, skip, widget), 0 errors, no block (see expectedCounts / expectedErrorCount / expectedBlock).
